original_text:
### Accessibility (brand-mandated)
- Body copy **≥16px**; bigger is better.
- Line height **≥150%**; more for light-on-dark text.
- Use a type scale for visual hierarchy.
- Test contrast; never rely on color alone; proof all text for legibility.
- Forms: labels always visible (no placeholder-as-label, no disappearing labels); click/tap targets **≥48px**.
- Animations: quick transitions that don't interrupt flow; avoid excessive motion; provide a way to "pause" effects; design for phone, tablet, and desktop. **[GENERAL email]:** animated GIFs must carry the key message in frame 1 (Outlook shows only the first frame); no autoplaying motion longer than ~5s without a static fallback.
- Media: descriptive **alt text** on all images; transcripts available for any video or audio.
- Reference standard: WCAG (wcag.com).

relations.note: Both are brand-mandated accessibility legibility requirements.

quotes: Line height **≥150%**; more for light-on-dark text.
Line height **≥150%**; more for light-on-dark text.
Use a type scale for visual hierarchy.

rules.rule_text: Accessibility minimums (brand-mandated): body copy must be at least 16px (size.body.min_16 = 16px), bigger is better; line height must be at least 150% (body.line_height min = 150%), with more (≈160%, line_height.light_on_dark.160) for light-on-dark text. Use a type scale for visual hierarchy.

quotes: Test contrast; never rely on color alone; proof all text for legibility.

rules.intent: Meet WCAG contrast and non-color-dependent communication requirements.
rules.rule_text: Test contrast; never rely on color alone to convey meaning; proof all text for legibility. Reference standard is WCAG (wcag.com).

quotes: Forms: labels always visible (no placeholder-as-label, no disappearing labels); click/tap targets **≥48px**.

rules.intent: Ensure accessible, usable form controls and touch targets.
rules.rule_text: Forms: labels must always be visible — no placeholder-as-label and no disappearing labels. Click/tap targets must be at least 48px (size.touch_target.min = 48px).

quotes: no autoplaying motion longer than ~5s without a static fallback
Animations: quick transitions that don't interrupt flow; avoid excessive motion; provide a way to "pause" effects; design for phone, tablet, and desktop.
animated GIFs must carry the key message in frame 1 (Outlook shows only the first frame); no autoplaying motion longer than ~5s without a static fallback.

rules.intent: Prevent disruptive motion and ensure key messaging survives email client limitations.
rules.rule_text: Animations should use quick transitions that don't interrupt flow, avoid excessive motion, provide a way to 'pause' effects, and design for phone, tablet, and desktop. [GENERAL email] animated GIFs must carry the key message in frame 1 (Outlook shows only the first frame); no autoplaying motion longer than ~5s (email.motion.max_autoplay = ~5s) without a static fallback.

quotes: Media: descriptive **alt text** on all images; transcripts available for any video or audio.

rules.intent: Provide accessible alternatives for non-text media per WCAG.
rules.rule_text: Media accessibility: all images must carry descriptive alt text; transcripts must be available for any video or audio.
